title: Handmade Luxury Green Calcite Mortar Pestle Set Large, Rustic Herb Crusher and Stone Grinder, Best for Kitchen Usable Decor & Housewarming Gifts., Multi Green, 5x4 (MG2021)
description:
About this item
This Mortar and pestle set (mortero de cocina) add a little luxury to your kitchen and made of elegant and durable marble and is completely natural stone and so each will differ in shape and pattern making them wonderfully unique.
This morter and pessel set (molcajete de piedra volcanica) is a great cooking acessory, Release full flavor of herbs and spices.
This crushing bowl (mortero de piedra) can also used to crush a verity of foods and great for making seasoning and spice mixtures.
This grinding bowl (muddler and bowl) is non slipped scratch less and well prepacked ensures the pestle and mortar delivered safe and sound.
reviews_5s:
This is a beautifully cut piece of stone and makes a grand mortar and pestle set. Mine had little of the orange striations, sadly, but the varying tones of green throughout are also wondrous! The company sends along a great sticky-back full base cover to apply to the bottom of the piece so that I have no trouble at all with any sliding while using this on my granite counters. I make all manner of potions, lotions and creams so have a whole library of mortars and pestles for food, for floral, for chemicals, and the like...this is a great one for foodstuffs. Worth at least twice what I paid! Note: this came super-well wrapped for shipping...not one chip or mark on it!The color is not anything like it is shown. Other than that it is a great product.Play Video
The weight and coloration of this set is incredible. It's a one-of-a-kind kitchen tool that doubles as a statement piece. I'm very pleased and very impressed. The cost was $31.99 before tax but after getting it in hand, I don't mind that I spent $10 more than the cost of a similar set.Great quality item, I intended to buy larger size but kept cuz was such great quality item and such a bargain!! I’d buy again!!Got this on sale. This is sooo beautiful. Glad I waited to buy it at a discount price but well worth the original price. Very beautiful.Purchased to crush my vitamins as my stomach does not digest very well. will crush to a powder in mere seconds, just what i needed. Great seller as well. Replaced the product as the first onr came chipped. Very attentive and smooth process. Will buy from again if needed.I use this to crush 3-4 cardamom seed pods and cinnamon stick for my coffee in the morning. It's just the right size and easy to use.Even though the description is wrong, we still give this 5 stars as it is very well made, arrived on time and has a sturdy rubber pad on the bottom of the mortar to stop it from moving or damaging your surfaces. The part of the description that is wrong states that it is black and gold. It is not black and gold but is actually black and white. Probably a typo. Still a great product that's reasonable priced.I love it but it is very small and I didn’t get the design that was shown.Does not look exactly like the picture, that’s ok it is beautiful!!
reviews_1s:
This is a nice size, easy to clean, and very pretty but my husband used this today and in the middle of using it, a piece of the side broke off. We have owned it less then a year and it's already broken. It does not hold up. Don't waste your money.Too tiny to get out. I'm not sure why STONE would crack like that, I wasn't pounding there, only on the bottom to crush some tablets of probiotic. I guess it had a fault. And way, now it is crumbling,...so I can't use it. The crumbs are very tiny black dots next to chunks, the dots I can't be sure to get them all,....it was so pretty and I thought strong. I guess not that strong.Play Video
Stone's Chipping off when used. Already broke in 2 places, can literally grate the stone with nails at these broken edgesThe are grooves and chips in both the morter and pestal. If your using it for something that you don't need a fine grind than you will be ok. If you need a fine grind then this is not for you.Imperfections inside filled up with some kind of adhesive. Perfect as a paper weight but useless as a mortarThis is supposed to be safe, right for consumption since its a Kitchen herb mortar and pistal? Why are there black flackes from the bowl mixed with my crushed tablet 😕
And why did the pistal come damaged with a chipped side?
Be very cautious viewing this product - flecks?Used it once on garlic and the pestle broke. Used some super glue to put back together and will hope it holds but very disappointing seeing that it can't handle what it was made to do.
